name: Lemon Pasta with Asparagus and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons grated lemon zest, about 2 lemons
salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
1/2 cup coarsely chopped roasted red peppers, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the asparagus and steam until tender-crisp, 3 to 4 minutes.
2. Cut into 1-inch lengths.
3. Cook the pasta, drain, and place in a warmed, large serving bowl; toss with oil.
4. Add asparagus, lemon zest, lemon juice, salt, pepper, roasted peppers (if using), and pine nuts.
5. Gently toss to mix.
6. Add cheese and toss; taste and adjust seasonings.
7. Serve immediately.
